name: Tabcorp Holdings Limited
analysis: TAH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.8600, stop A$0.7697, target A$0.9613 (1.12:1) — then trail it.
